title: Cryptool launches News & Announcements
author: Cryptool
excerpt_html: Cryptool now has a dedicated News & Announcements section for product releases, partnerships, and platform updates.
content_html:
Cryptool now has a dedicated News & Announcements section. This is where we'll post product releases, new chain integrations, partnerships, and other platform updates as they happen.

Why a separate section

Announcements are short, time-sensitive, and frequent. Keeping them separate from the longer-form blog makes both easier to follow.
